modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about moving allowance policies and procedures

full_description_text:  
User seeks clarification on moving allowance policies.  
Questions include eligibility criteria for moving allowances.  
User also inquires about processing moving allowances for new employees.
